title: When did evangelion initially air
wikitext:
[]: When did evangelion initially air?             Quote Post by arilando » Sat Oct 13, 2012 12:41 pm I mean as in the exact time it aired, like 19:00. I havent been able to find this information online, so help would be appreciated.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Sat Oct 13, 2012 1:03 pm Apparently you almost got it right, JoeD80 recently mentioned that it aired at 18:30 while symbv in the past said 18:30 to 17:00, I'm not sure what he exactly meant with that, maybe there were temporary or permanent modifications during the airing.

[]: Re: When did evangelion initially air?             Quote Post by Ornette » Sat Oct 13, 2012 1:15 pm arilando wrote: I mean as in the exact time it aired, like 19:00. I havent been able to find this information online, so help would be appreciated.

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Sat Oct 13, 2012 2:58 pm Japanese wiki is very useful for this http://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/%E6%96%B0%E4%B8%96%E7%B4%80%E3%82%A8%E3%83%B4%E3%82%A1%E3%83%B3%E3%82%B2%E3%83%AA%E3%82%AA%E3%83%B3#.E6.9C.AC.E6.94.BE.E9.80.81

[]:             Quote Post by arilando » Sat Oct 13, 2012 3:40 pm I have another question. Are there any statistics on how many copies the original VHS and laser disc releases sold?

[]:             Quote Post by Clover » Sat Oct 13, 2012 7:12 pm arilando wrote: I have another question. Are there any statistics on how many copies the original VHS and laser disc releases sold?

[]:             Quote Post by JoeD80 » Sun Oct 14, 2012 9:43 pm On the original TV Tokyo broadcast it was on at 6:30 PM, the slot that was previously held by Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles. The only episode that aired at 5:30 PM was #13/"Angel Invasion" (which is what the post Ornette linked to is referring to). Also #14 aired at 8:00 AM. That picture says 2,226,000 sold but thats only for #1 - #10, so before the release of episodes 21 and beyond on video.

[]:             Quote Post by svenge » Mon Oct 15, 2012 1:52 pm See HERE for sales figures.
summary:

Article: When did evangelion initially air
D80 » Sun Oct 14, 2012 9:43 pm On the original TV Tokyo broadcast it was on at 6:30 PM, the slot that was previously held by Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles. The only episode that aired at 5:30 PM was #13/"Angel Invasion" (which is what the post Ornette linked to is referring to). Also #14 aired at 8:00 AM. That picture says 2,226,000 sold but thats only for #1 - #10, so before the release of episodes 21 and beyond on video.
